case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. CESAR A GRAMAJO ALVARADO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALVARADO, CESAR A GRAMAJO $391.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $471.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00); PROOF OF SERVICE STAMPED: VIA FAX FILE SERVED JAN-14-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO, CESAR A GRAMAJO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CESAR A. GRAMAJO ALVARADO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2020 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $391.36 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ALVARADO, CESAR A GRAMAJO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
